title: Apple is launching a Klarna-backed device leasing program called Apple Upgrade on July 28
summary: Apple is launching Apple Upgrade on July 28, a Klarna-backed leasing program for iPhones, Macs, iPads, and Apple Watches that replaces its current financing. Apple is also widely expected to raise iPhone prices when new models arrive in September.
caption: output/2026-07-21/apple-is-launching-a-klarna-backed-device-leasing-program-called-apple.txt
